content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Bank Nifty +2.34%, Pharma +2.55%, Auto +2.20%, PSU Bank +2.67%, VIX collapsing -5.6% to 16.9. A/D ratio strongly positive; both held positions and watchlist names showing strength. With 45 mins to close, focus is on locking in gains via SL trails on winners rather than chasing fresh entries late.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.6% unrealized winner. Current SL 1037.53 is below VWAP 1052; trailing slightly to 1040 (still ~1.6% below CMP, satisfies trail-gap discipline). ICICI Sec target Rs 1,350 supports continued upside. Tightening locks in ~5.7% gain minimum."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1% with SL 119 ~4% below CMP. Gold pulled back but structural uptrend intact, USD weak, CB buying continues. No trail justified yet (P&L not >+2%). Hold to original SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.4% winner; ATH zone with strong Q4 + Capital Group institutional buy. Trail SL 1715 → 1730 (locks in +1.8%, sits ~1.6% below CMP 1757 — passes 1% trail-gap). Target 1800 intact (Jefferies Rs 1,980)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.2% with SL at entry 4575. P&L below 2% trail trigger; SL at breakeven already. CRITICAL: board meeting May 14 (6 sessions away — outside 3-session binary window for now, but I'll re-evaluate by May 11). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op check: stored SL is already 6960, target 7400. P&L +2.2% just clears 2% trigger but SL is already at entry+0.9%, effectively breakeven+. No MODIFY change needed — this is a NO-OP. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.2% with SL at entry 838. Q4 board meeting expected in May (binary risk), basket move not company-specific. SL already at breakeven; no further trail needed at sub-2% gain. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1% essentially flat. SL 362 ~1.8% below CMP 369. P&L below 2% trail trigger. Hold to original SL/target; Q4 strong, MOSL TP Rs 325 raised."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry. SL 818 ~0.3% below CMP — already tight. No P&L gain to trail. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9% just below 2% trail trigger. SL 1265 already above entry (locks in +0.5%). Sufficient for now — no MODIFY needed (would be micro-adjust)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1% flat. SL 2980 ~1.6% below CMP — appropriate. No trail justified at sub-2% gain. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% flat. SL 790 ~2.3% below CMP. P&L below 2% trail trigger. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1040.00, "reasoning": "Lock minimum +5.7% gain on winner; gap to CMP ~1.6%."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Slight loser; SL appropriate at 119."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1730.00, "reasoning": "ATH winner; trail to lock +1.8% with adequate noise gap."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; awaiting May 14 board catalyst."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already above entry; no further trail at 2.2% gain."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; basket-move rally, await Q4."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Near flat; no trail trigger."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat; SL already tight at 818."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL above entry; sufficient until +4% trigger."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat; SL appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat; SL gap fine."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "NEULANDLAB: avoid — May 12 binary results 4 sessions away, already a Q3 -34% miss. AUROPHARMA/AJANTPHARM/SRF/M&M/HINDPETRO/VEDL: strong sector moves but late in session at +5-10% intraday — chasing breakouts at 14:45 with 45 min left has poor R:R. BIOCON/LAURUSLABS at multi-month highs — wait for pullback to 20EMA. Pharma cluster (BIOCON/LAURUSLABS/AUROPHARMA/AJANTPHARM/NEULANDLAB) is 5 names — cluster discipline says max 1 new entry, and we'd want it sized into pullback not late-day chase.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-deployed at 54%, 11 positions across Financial Services (PNBHOUSING/ABCAPITAL/CAMS), Defence/CapGoods (HAL/GRSE/TITAGARH), Infra (ADANIPORTS), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), IT (COFORGE), FMCG (MARICO), Gold (GOLDBEES). Diversified. Trade count today is 21 — heavy churn against 14% win rate over 5 days. Discipline now is to LET WINNERS RUN with trailing SLs, not add fresh late-day positions. Two binary catalysts in book to monitor: HAL May 14, NEULAND-style Q4s in TITAGARH/CAMS pending. Net portfolio +0.5% today, +0.72% experiment-to-date."
}
